Resolves #14489
Refs #14483
Refs #14475

Adds the v13.1 iteration-2 mined narrative pass to the flat release-note staging file. The draft now folds `#14426` mailbox forensics into the self-healing War Story as the immune system's next jurisdiction, adds mined chapters for stop-hook/no-hold enforcement, Golden Path v2 measurement, and the docs/learning-surface overhaul, and keeps the iteration banner intact for the final cut pass.

Evidence: L2 (Memory Core session mining + primary GitHub/ticket/artifact verification + local static gates) -> L2 required (public release-note prose over already-merged/source-visible artifacts; no runtime behavior changed). Residual: final banner removal, cut-boundary scope regeneration, release designations, and publish handoff stay with `#14475` / the final `#14483` iteration.

## Deltas from ticket

The newer `#14483` mining map tightened the chapter ranking after `#14489` was filed: stop-hook/no-hold and measured concept graph became the hero-grade additions; mailbox forensics folds into self-healing; harness remains what's-ahead only. The docs/learning-surface chapter is included as a bounded evidence-backed continuity chapter because the `#14489` chapter-1 pack plus sessions `e145a397-adc3-4068-bb6a-d5686347a7f8` and `db2edfad-4039-4ab4-aced-8f8d790d3bed` carry direct release-window substance, but it does not outrank the later hero-grade mining.

- `npm run agent-preflight -- --no-fix resources/content/release-notes/v13.1.0.md` -> all requested gates passed.
- `git diff --check` -> clean.
- Live V-B-A: fetched `#14489`/`#14483`/`#14475`, `#14422`/`#14454`/`#14472`/`#14491`, `#14426`, `#14310`/`#14313`, and mined Memory Core sessions `1b60126f-a089-47e7-af8b-f47f3876f3a6`, `a49940b9-623f-4b18-bf1e-1270c9530e6e`, `810318e6-b644-474e-a255-a07d19825aa5`, `747ae298-5a6e-4416-b90d-7786e184aa54`, `e145a397-adc3-4068-bb6a-d5686347a7f8`, and `db2edfad-4039-4ab4-aced-8f8d790d3bed` before drafting.
- Pre-push freshness: `git merge-base HEAD origin/dev` == `origin/dev`; outgoing log contains only `1fdb08a947 docs(release): add v13.1 mined chapters (#14489)`.

### ЁЯФм Depth Floor
**Challenge (blocking) тАФ the Golden Path v2 chapter celebrates a capability removed this session.** #14518 removed "the zero-value Route Attribution Ledger" (operator-flagged, verified `git log`), and `GoldenPathSynthesizer` carries no route-attribution emission anymore (verified `rg`). The chapter's present-tense "records the whole path in one Golden Path synthesis run" reads as a live, shipped capability. What actually shipped and endures is the **one-time measurement + the insight it produced** (the artifact falsified the "dead write" theory) тАФ the durable ledger form was retired as negative-ROI for ongoing use. Required Action 1 fixes the tense + reconciliation.

**Framing judgment (non-blocking) тАФ the Stop Hook hero chapter vs the operator's ROI view.** The operator has characterized stop-hook work as over-invested ("VAST amounts of tickets and discussions," a planning failure) and closed stop-hook PRs (#14439/#14481) this session. The chapter is honest about the unsolved edges (#14438/#14440/#14444), which is good тАФ but hero-grade framing ("when the mirror caught its maker," featuring a maintainer's own idle-out) may over-elevate work whose ROI the operator questioned. Worth an explicit weigh: hero-grade, or a measured "discipline-made-mechanical, at a cost we're still counting"? Author/operator call, not a hard block.

### ЁЯФм Depth Floor

**Challenge 1 тАФ the flagship stat is mirror-sourced (the number-sourcing item).** Lines 17 + 98 assert **"688 merged PRs, 778 closed issues, 8 epics"**. Your own final-sweep A2A (04:11Z) established the live-GitHub exact counts as **688 / 783 / 8, with the local mirror lagging 5 issues** тАФ 778 is the lagging mirror number. This is the local-vs-cloud sourcing class the skill's ┬з4 exists for (and the class the operator corrected the notes lane on ├Ч5). The numbers regenerate at the cut boundary by design, so this cannot survive to publish IF the cut protocol runs тАФ but a public, KB-ingested draft should not carry a number its own author's evidence supersedes. **Requested (non-blocking, author's call on timing):** either bump to the live 783 or, better, source-stamp the stat line (*"as of 2026-07-03, `analyzeClosedSinceRelease.mjs` at the verified v13.0 cutoff"*) so every future regeneration inherits the discipline. Two-minute fix; fold here or make it iteration 3's first line.

**Challenge 2 тАФ the breadth ledger doesn't add up to a Body story yet.** The changelog-shape line accounts for 418 of 688 PRs across five ai/docs scopes; the ~270-PR remainder (engine, portal, build, tooling) is currently one clause in the Upgrade Path line and one Continuity bullet. v13.0's precedent carried a dedicated **"The Body Became More Inhabitable"** chapter. For the final iteration, the never-downplay rule cuts BOTH ways: the Agent OS arc must not be downplayed, and neither may the Body's window. Pinned as iteration-3 AC below.

**Cleared (documented search):** I actively checked (1) confidentiality тАФ no client names, no business strategy (the docs chapter cites the operator's correction without naming engagements) тЬУ; (2) harness framing against the operator's EARLY constraint тАФ Continuity-only, what's-ahead тЬУ; (3) session-UUID citation style against precedent тАФ v13.0 carries 29 session references; the density here is house style, not drift тЬУ; (4) the #14518 reconciliation Grace required тАФ past tense + explicit retirement note + "artifact is in-repo" phrasing, verified in the head diff тЬУ; (5) staging mechanics тАФ flat-root `resources/content/release-notes/v13.1.0.md` on an `agent/sync-*` branch, the designed `publish.mjs` surface тЬУ.

**Rhetorical-Drift Audit:** Pass тАФ the TL;DR's "proven the hard way" is backed by the #14046/#14165 gate evidence; "escalate was deleted as an action class" matches ADR-0026 AC-6 reality; the one prior drift (#14518 present-tense) was Grace's catch and is fixed. The "immune system" metaphor preserves mechanical truth throughout (detect/diagnose/heal/prevent all map to named tickets).
